title: Host any coding agent on AgentCore
summary: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore is a service that enables hosting and running multiple coding agents including Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, and Kiro. Users can deploy any coding agent on the platform via the Bedrock service.
writeup: This video demonstrates how Amazon Bedrock AgentCore hosts and runs coding agents, including Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, and Kiro. It matters because AgentCore positions itself as a single platform for deploying any coding agent rather than one tied to a specific tool. The key takeaway: any coding agent can be deployed and run through the Bedrock service.
